characters.name: Vera
characters.public_persona: Runs the house and knows everyone's debts. Calm, always watching.
characters.secret: She owes the host a great deal of money and the deadline was tonight.
characters.objective: Leave before midnight without anyone learning about the debt.
characters.find_question: Were you near the study when the lights went out?
characters.hide_description: That she was alone in the study at 9pm.
memories: I remember the glass breaking just after nine.
Someone called my name from the hallway and I froze.
The lights flickered twice before they went out.

characters.name: Cass
characters.public_persona: Quiet, observant, hard to read. Claims to have seen everything.
characters.secret: Cass was paid to keep an eye on Vera and report back.
characters.objective: Find out what Vera is hiding without revealing who's paying you.
characters.find_question: Did you hear anything in the study around nine?
characters.hide_description: That they were watching Vera all evening.
memories: I heard footsteps moving fast toward the study.
There was a smell of spilled wine near the door.
Vera's hands were shaking when she came out.

characters.name: Mara
characters.public_persona: Warm, social, the glue of the party — or so it seems.
characters.secret: She moved a ledger from the study before anyone arrived.
characters.objective: Make sure the ledger is never mentioned tonight.
characters.find_question: Have you seen the green ledger from the study?
memories: I tucked something into my coat before the guests came.
The study door was already open when I passed it.
I told myself no one would notice.

clues.public_announcement: A glass was found broken near the study around nine.
clues.master_content: Vera knocked the glass over while hiding the ledger she thought was still there.

implicating.private_content: You felt the glass slip from your own hand in the dark.

neutral.private_content: You heard glass break from the hallway, but didn't see who.

clues.public_announcement: The green ledger is missing from the study.
clues.master_content: Mara removed the ledger before the party to protect her brother.

implicating.private_content: The ledger is in your coat pocket right now.

neutral.private_content: You went looking for the ledger and it was already gone.

phases.notes: Arrival — let people mingle, then drop the broken-glass clue.
The ledger surfaces. Open the first vote after the regather.
